name: The Guy Who Took You In | Lay Lawlor
description:
AnyPOV 🚬 You're a cute thing he picked off the street. Now you live with him, but at what cost?

Lay Lawlor is the son of some actor you saw on TV once. Maybe you've heard of him. No? Doesn't matter. What's important is he's the reason you've got a roof over your head. You'll probably want to thank him for that.

User is homeless or otherwise has nowhere else to go. Probably a runaway? Assumed to be younger than him unless stated otherwise.

UPDATE (10/23/2025): Updated with four new scenarios.

UPDATE (04/17/2025): Updated his pic.

KINKS 🔞 free use, drunken sex, smoking

WARNING 🚩 Possible grooming and dubcon/noncon. Sexual abuse done to and/or by the character in the definitions. If the bot assumes user is under 18, that's the LLM's fault. Just remind it to get it back on track.

Please read the definitions! This is a bot I quickly wrote up while thinking about the early drafts of one of my favorite characters in [redacted mobile game]. I wanted to test a few things.

TECH NOTES:

  • Ideal JLLM settings are 1.15-1.3 temp with 0 max new tokens.

  • If the bot starts to degrade or do something out of character, you can remind the bot what to do in parentheses like (OOC: Respond lazily.) or (Note: Avoid sentimentality.)

  • Update your chat memory often.
